name: Cloud Storage Data Exfiltration
description: Attack tree modelling exfiltration of sensitive data from cloud storage services (S3, Azure Blob, GCS) through misconfiguration, credential theft, and insider access
root_objective: Exfiltrate sensitive data from cloud object storage at scale

nodes.title: Exfiltrate Data from Cloud Storage
nodes.description: Access and exfiltrate large volumes of sensitive data from S3 buckets, Azure Blob containers, or GCS buckets

nodes.title: Exploit Public Bucket Misconfiguration
nodes.description: Find and access cloud storage containers that are accidentally publicly accessible

nodes.title: Enumerate Public S3 Buckets
nodes.description: Use bucket name wordlists and DNS enumeration to discover publicly listable/readable S3 buckets

nodes.title: Exploit Azure Blob Anonymous Access
nodes.description: Access Azure Blob containers with anonymous read enabled, often containing backups or exports

nodes.title: Steal Cloud Credentials
nodes.description: Obtain IAM keys, SAS tokens, or service account keys with storage read permissions

nodes.title: Harvest Keys from Git Repositories
nodes.description: Scan public and private Git repos for accidentally committed AWS access keys or Azure SAS tokens

nodes.title: Extract Keys from EC2 Metadata (SSRF)
nodes.description: Exploit SSRF vulnerability to query the instance metadata service and steal IAM role credentials

nodes.title: Compromise CI/CD Pipeline Secrets
nodes.description: Access storage credentials stored in CI/CD environment variables or secret managers

nodes.title: Bypass Access Controls
nodes.description: Circumvent bucket policies, ACLs, or VPC endpoints to gain data access

nodes.title: Exploit Overly Permissive Bucket Policy
nodes.description: Identify S3 bucket policies that grant access to any authenticated AWS user (Principal: *)

nodes.title: Abuse Cross-Account Access
nodes.description: Use a misconfigured cross-account role to assume access to the target's storage account

nodes.title: Exfiltrate Data Covertly
nodes.description: Copy data out while avoiding detection by logging and DLP systems

nodes.title: Replicate to Attacker-Owned Bucket
nodes.description: Use S3 replication or presigned URLs to copy data to an attacker-controlled storage account

nodes.title: Disable CloudTrail / Access Logging
nodes.description: Turn off access logging on the bucket to prevent detection of bulk data download
